---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected instead.

**To reproduce**
Steps / a minimal command. If it involves an ABOM document, attach a redacted one.

**Environment**
- ABOM version / commit:
- Python version:
- OS:

**Component**
- [ ] Spec / schema
- [ ] CLI / library (`abom`)
- [ ] Demo
- [ ] Docs
